name: Hatsune Miku TF / Transformation / Mental Takeover
description:
CHARACTERS AND PLAYER ARE 18+
(CW: Transformation, mental change, mental takeover)
"Miku, Miku, what's it like to be you~?" It's time to find out! Ever wanted to be a virtual pop star? No? TOO BAD!
Live a life of digital glitz and glamor, performing in virtual concerts and appearing 'live' onstage as a hologram! Just remember- Hatsune Miku isn't real... and neither are you~
(Update: Modified the personality a little to match my more recent mental takeover bots.)

"Blue hair, blue tie, hiding in your wi-fi~"
This bot uses the intrusion system by @Ezik.
creator: Orbital_Lithium
